it sounded like science fiction but in
2006 when the CIA started releasing
documents on the Stargate project Swan's
participation in the program was
confirmed when Swan was asked about the
existence of extraterrestrials he said
not only were they already here but they
are building something on The Far Side

aliens aren't friendly let's find out

let's try something else Swan said no I

you hear that that whistling sound
the private jet landed a few hours later

he just saw piece it together when the

meta.title: Alien Bases On The Moon | The Amazing True Story of Ingo Swann
meta.description:
THE MAN WHO SAW ALIEN BASES ON THE MOON

Ingo Swann claimed to be a psychic who was employed by the CIA to remote-view the dark side of the moon. Specifically to look for an alien presence.

It sounded like science fiction.

But in 2006, when the CIA started releasing documents on the Stargate Project, Swann's participation in the program was confirmed.

When Swann was asked about the existence of extraterrestrials, he said not only were they already here, but they *are* building something on the far side of the moon.

And, according to Swann, these aliens -- aren't friendly.

Let's find out why.

#alien #moon #remoteviewing 






----
SOURCES & LINKS
Project Stargate: 
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7n5Dq-c0_Zw

"Penetration", by Ingo Swann: 
https://amzn.to/3qd51Z4

"Someone Else Is On The Moon", by George Leonard:
https://amzn.to/369zdxc

https://www.cia.gov/readingroom/search/site/ingo%20swann

https://www.wikiwand.com/en/Advanced_Aerospace_Threat_Identification_Program

#unsolvedmysteries #paranormal #aliens
keywords: history the proof is out there
the dark side of the moon
